text.title: Modern BA Framework: BABOK for Agile, AI/ML, Cloud, and Platform Delivery Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real engagements applying modern-ba-framework. Each entry pairs symptom + root cause + fix.

antipattern.fix: Require explicit perspective_set declaration; agent must list and validate.

antipattern.symptom: Missing BI / BizArch / BPM when ask demands them.
antipattern.fix: Reviewer checks perspective_set against ask keywords (metric, lineage, process).
Only declare perspectives with concrete deliverables; reject empty lenses.
Each declared perspective must adapt ≥1 KA task.
